name: claude-code-goal
title: claude-code-goal
description: Generic Claude Code Opus 4.8 workflow that actively investigates available Rielflow workflows at each step, defines and reviews a goal, creates and reviews an in-session plan without writing plan files, performs the work, may delegate to a more specific workflow when appropriate, and reviews goal completion before looping back to work or planning.
